goal: is_isolated_point_of_set(s, x) = s.contains(x) and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) and x0 != x implies not x0.is_close(x, k0) } }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 = x2 or not x2.is_close(x1, k0) } }) = is_isolated_point_of_set(x0, x1) }(s, x)

let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ isolated_set(s) and not w0 ∈ s }

(forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ t or x0 = x or not x0.is_close(x, eps) } = true)
